figures.caption: Table 2: Repair performance (Correct / Plausible) on Defects4J under Perfect Fault Localization.

Figure 1: Compress-26 repair comparison between the static-only approach (left) and TraceRepair (right). The static agent misattributes the fault to numToSkip -= skipped, a line never reached. TraceRepair captures skipped=0, Action=BREAK via the Probe Agent and guides Repair Agents to the correct read() fallback.
